name: Claude Code (mentor mode)
description: Installs the Claude Code CLI, by default locked into a mentor configuration that teaches and reviews but never writes code, edits files or commits.

version.description: Claude Code release channel or version: 'stable', 'latest' or a specific version number (e.g. '2.0.14').

teacherMode.description: Apply the mentor guardrails (user CLAUDE.md, Mentor output style, permission deny rules and a PreToolUse hook) so Claude guides instead of producing code. Set to false for a plain CLI install.
